events.eventName: AT THE FOREST EDGE ACRYLIC CLASS
events.modalDescription: An expressive acrylic composition revealing depth and calm through layered greens and light. Some images used in our announcements are digital visual references created to illustrate the theme of the class. Final artworks created during the workshop may vary and will reflect each participant’s personal interpretation.

events.description: Beginner-friendly. All supplies provided + light snacks and beverages
events.modalDescription: Learn how to paint expressive, realistic flowers in acrylics through a modern step-by-step approach designed for beginners and intermediate artists alike. Throughout this 5-week course, you’ll explore color mixing, light and shadow, soft petal transitions, texture, and depth while creating beautiful floral paintings on canvas. No previous experience needed — just a love for creativity and flowers.

regularClasses.eventName: REGULAR ART CLASSES FOR ADULTS (4 classes)
regularClasses.modalDescription: Master visual arts through group lessons designed to your interests and skill level. Explore painting, drawing, and composition at your own pace in a relaxed and supportive environment.
Creativity, dreams, inspiration - the world of art awaits you! We practice a variety of techniques, materials and subjects in our classes.

siteText.bannerQuote:
“Art washes away from the
soul the dust
of everyday life”
siteText.whyTitle:
Let’s get creative!
Art classes for all
whyLeftItems: group workshops for children and adults
courses in the visual arts for all levels of training and much more
whyRightItems: professional experience teaching fine arts for over 12 years
friendly and inspiring atmosphere at the classes
aboutParagraphs: Good to see you here! My name is Alevtyna, I am a professional fine arts teacher based in Calgary. I am continuously inspired by world we live in and can never resist putting this beauty on a canvas.

My preferred art style is realism and I have academic knowledge and practical experience of applying it in painting, drawing, and compositions. Along with my students I work on creating portraits, landscapes, architecture stills, and a lot more.

However, I’m always open to exploring new styles, approaches, and techniques. I believe that there are limitless possibilities when it comes to art and I want to inspire my students to experiment and express themselves.

faq.question: What if I don’t have any experience with painting?
faq.answer: Don’t worry! I will find an individual approach to each student based on their level of experience.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own materials or supplies?
faq.answer: All materials and supplies are included in the cost of the workshop. The high quality of the materials provided is guaranteed.

faq.question: What if I can’t complete the work in the allotted time or draw it faster?
faq.answer: The average length of the class is 3 hours, but of course students can work at different paces. I will monitor the process so that you have a finished work. The remaining time can be spent socializing with other students, having drinks and snacks.
